title: {YTPMV} ~ Run Away From Mike
description:
SEIZURE WARNING (Or headache warning, if you don't have Photosensitive Epilepsy.) There's lots of bright, flashy crap. Avert your eyes if you must, but not your ears.

MP3: http://www.mediafire.com/listen/17txb935g33i10w/Run_Away_From_Mike_1.mp3

The song is "Run Away" by the Sunstroke Project. Known around the interwebz as "Epic Sax Guy"
